header.subtitle: Our Story
header.title: The Velmurugan Motors Legacy
header.desc: Pioneering urban mobility in Madurai: A 15-year journey of trust, speed, and reliability.

story.title: Driven by Madurai, Built on Unshakeable Trust
story.p1: Hero Velmurugan Motors was founded with a simple belief — every person in Madurai deserves access to a reliable, high-quality two-wheeler at a fair price. What started as a small showroom has grown into one of Madurai's most trusted Hero MotoCorp dealerships.
story.p2: Our founder, Mr. Krishnamoorthi, has spent over 15 years building relationships with customers across the city and surrounding villages. He understands the needs of farmers, students, working professionals, and families — because they are our neighbours, our community.
story.p3: Today, our team of Hero-certified technicians and friendly sales staff carry that same spirit forward — ensuring every customer who walks through our door leaves with confidence, clarity, and the right bike for their needs.

items.title: Customer First
items.desc: Every decision we make puts the customer's needs and trust at the centre.

items.title: Genuine Quality
items.desc: We only sell and service with 100% original Hero MotoCorp parts and standards.

items.title: Community Focus
items.desc: Deeply rooted in Madurai, we give back to the community that has supported us.

items.title: Continuous Growth
items.desc: We constantly improve our service to match evolving customer needs.

items.title: Founded
items.desc: Hero Velmurugan Motors opened its doors in Madurai, starting with a small showroom.

items.title: Service Centre
items.desc: Expanded with a dedicated Hero-certified service and spare parts centre.

items.title: 5,000+ Legends
items.desc: Crossed the milestone of 5,000 satisfied riders across Madurai district.

items.title: Digital Transformation
items.desc: Launched contactless enquiries and virtual showroom experiences.

items.title: 10,000+ Families
items.desc: Proudly serving over 10,000 families with a fleet of Hero motorcycles.

partnership.desc: As an authorised Hero MotoCorp dealership, we uphold the highest standards of sales, service, and customer care. Every bike we sell comes with Hero's full manufacturer warranty and our personal commitment to your satisfaction.
